/usr/bin/ar qc libiplug2_vst3.a CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/IPlugAPIBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/IPlugParameter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/IPlugPluginBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/IPlugProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/IPlugTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_Controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_Processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iplug2_vst3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_ProcessorBase.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libiplug2_vst3.a
